response.overview: Mirage is the second studio album by the English progressive rock band Camel, released on 1 March 1974. The album was released on Gama Records/Deram Records. There are five tracks on Mirage, two over 9 minutes. Those two are multi-part songs: "Lady Fantasy" and "Nimrodel/The Procession/The White Rider", the latter being about The Lord of the Rings. "Supertwister" includes a showcase for Andrew Latimer's flute.
response.title: Camel: Mirage
